name: The Local Drive
about: The Local Drive RiNo Denver is a premier indoor golf facility and cocktail bar offering year-round play regardless of weather. The venue features 12 bays equipped with Trackman simulators and provides a vibrant, upscale atmosphere suitable for both casual and competitive golfers. Beyond golf, it operates as a full-service bar with an emphasis on locally distilled spirits and craft cocktails, along with private event spaces for various occasions.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 400 legendary courses including PGA Tour favorites
State-of-the-art Trackman technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Professional club fittings, lessons, and consultations with an in-house PGA pro
Flexible space for both serious practice and social gatherings

food_and_drink.notes: Bar games and snacks available for non-golfers
Full-service bar with local craft cocktails, spirits, beers, seltzers, ciders, and wines

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can use provided Srixon demo clubs or bring your own gear.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted, but the venue offers a full-service bar with local craft cocktails and snacks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes varies depending on pace of play and number of players in the bay.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of kid-friendly amenities or policies, but bar games may appeal to older children.
